Edinburgh.name: Witchery by the Castle
Edinburgh.notes: Theatrical, candle-lit, opulent — a classic Edinburgh splurge by the castle.

Edinburgh.name: Prestonfield House
Edinburgh.notes: Lavish afternoon tea in a 17th-century country house.

Edinburgh.name: Tempting Tattie
Edinburgh.notes: Scottish loaded baked potatoes — cheap and hearty.

Edinburgh.name: Lannan Bakery
Edinburgh.notes: Acclaimed pastries; go early before they sell out.

Edinburgh.name: Gleneagles Townhouse
Edinburgh.notes: Grand bar in a former bank — drinks with a view.

Edinburgh.name: Stramish
Edinburgh.notes: Traditional Scottish ceilidh music and dancing.

Edinburgh.name: Scotsman Hotel & Cinema
Edinburgh.notes: Historic hotel with its own screening room.

Isle of Skye.name: Dulse & Brose
Isle of Skye.notes: At The Bosville (your hotel) — fresh Skye produce, warm and unfussy. Book ahead.

Isle of Skye.name: Sea Breezes
Isle of Skye.notes: Quayside institution; local langoustines, hand-dived scallops. Reservations essential.

Isle of Skye.name: Scorrybreac
Isle of Skye.notes: Intimate, creative tasting menu using island ingredients. Tiny — book well ahead.

Isle of Skye.name: Cafe Arriba
Isle of Skye.notes: Casual harbour-view spot; great Cullen skink.

Isle of Skye.name: The Isles Inn
Isle of Skye.notes: Laid-back pub grub — haggis and pies done well.

Isle of Skye.name: The Rosedale
Isle of Skye.notes: Harbour-view hotel restaurant; seafood-forward and romantic.
